task: I just logged out and signed up as a new user and still had the data from the previous user. Make sure on logout we clear all react queries, delete all local data so like no state is still there after logout.
user_feedback_text: I just logged out and signed up as a new user and still had the data from the previous user. Make sure on logout we clear all react queries, delete all local data so like no state is still there after logout.
